decisions.title: Select distributed DB for timeseries indexing by March 20
decisions.context: ENG-8565 performance testing in progress. Need to choose between candidates to unblock ENG-7931 prototype and future scale requirements. Critical for Nail the Core pillar—core algorithm performance depends on indexing speed.
decisions.blockedBy: Performance test results from heavier workload scenarios

arguments.for: Timeseries indexing bottleneck blocks large-file processing (ENG-9000). Choosing DB enables prototype completion and unblocks calculated channels (ENG-8798).
arguments.against: Rushing decision without complete performance data risks costly migration later. Current system may handle near-term load.

decisions.title: Complete kluctl migration by March 31 or pause
decisions.context: 7+ ENG-7xxx tickets deploying services with kluctl (prometheus, grafana, webhooks, migrations, backend). Infrastructure modernization supports Build the Moat but consuming substantial eng capacity during Q1.

arguments.for: Modern deployment reduces toil, enables faster shipping of Explore V2 and Canvas features. Gov/prod k8s upgrades (ENG-7607-9) require stable tooling.
arguments.against: Opportunity cost high—team not shipping customer-facing features. Could defer non-critical services, focus on backend+migrations only.

decisions.title: Prioritize observability debt vs new feature development
decisions.context: Multiple alert gaps: Kafka lag monitoring broken (ENG-9053), pts-id-service lacks P99/disk alerts (ENG-8981-2), data-batcher missing metrics (ENG-9049), keycloak registration failures silent (ENG-8852). Affects Signal>Evidence>Decision reliability.
decisions.blockedBy: Resource allocation between reliability work and FD-34/40 data export features

arguments.for: Blind spots risk customer trust and Decisions Captured metric. Stalled partitions and latency spikes directly degrade core experience. Fix now prevents future fire drills.
arguments.against: FD-34/40 data export enables Embed Deeper by unlocking external integrations. Customers waiting on export capabilities. Alerts can wait 2 weeks.

decisions.title: Resolve CSV upload date format bug immediately vs batch with other CSV fixes
decisions.context: ENG-9020: slash date format breaks uploads. Affects data ingestion, a Nail the Core capability. Small fix but touches parsing logic.

arguments.for: Customer-reported blocker. Fast fix restores trust, demonstrates responsiveness. Aligns with North Star—can't capture decisions from broken uploads.
arguments.against: Isolated issue affecting <5 customers based on slash format prevalence. Batching with broader CSV validation refactor (if planned) avoids repeated parser changes.

decisions.title: Accelerate cleanup tasks (pvcs, old redis, read-cache) or extend timeline
decisions.context: ENG-7730, 7734, 7735 remove deprecated infrastructure. Cleanup enables cost savings and reduces operational complexity but competes with feature work.
decisions.blockedBy: Kluctl migration must complete first to safely identify orphaned resources

arguments.for: Old infrastructure costs money, creates confusion, risks incidents from abandoned components. Cleanup unblocks clearer system model for new engineers.
arguments.against: Low customer impact. Old systems stable. Defer until Q2 when kluctl settled and team has bandwidth post-feature push.

northStar.name: Decisions Captured Per Customer
northStar.delta: at_risk due to CSV upload failures (ENG-9020), potential Kafka partition stalls (ENG-9053), and large-file processing gaps (ENG-9000)

keyResults.name: Core algorithm handles large files without skipping
